title: lachnagrostis rudis subsp. rudis
intro: Lachnagrostis rudis subsp. rudis, also known as rough barley grass, is a plant species belonging to the grass family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of coughs and sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or dried and used in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
